entries.title: GrubMarket Arms Food Distributor Sales Teams With New AI Agent
entries.summary: GrubMarket has expanded its GrubMarket AI platform to include a Sales AI Agent designed for use by wholesale food distributors. The new Sales AI Agent helps sales teams identify prospective customers, analyze menus and order guides, and generate customer-ready price sheets, the company said in a Monday (June 8) press release. entries.title: Apple Shows AI Siri and Investors Aren’t Impressed
entries.summary: Apple unveiled its long-awaited Siri AI Monday (June 8), saying in a press release that the artificial intelligence-powered personal assistant can answer questions from the web and surface relevant information from the user’s personal messages, emails and photos. “With access to broad world knowledge for up-to-date answers on virtually any topic, along with onscreen […] The post Apple Shows

entries.title: Alibaba CEO Takes Direct Control of New AI Business Unit
entries.summary: Alibaba Group has formed a new business unit called Token Foundry as part of the company’s reorganization plan to strengthen its artificial intelligence (AI) efforts, Seeking Alpha reported Monday (June 8). entries.title: Apple’s AI Play Finally Landed at WWDC Two Years Late
entries.summary: Apple used WWDC 2026 to finally deliver the Siri overhaul it has been promising since 2024. The question underneath the announcement is whether a better Siri changes Apple’s position in the AI race, or whether it simply delays a more uncomfortable reckoning. entries.title: Clear Junction to support institutional access to Agent's pound stearling stablecoin GBPA
entries.summary: Clear Junction Group, a global payments infrastructure provider serving financial institutions and cryptoasset businesses, has announced a UK-focused partnership between Clear Junction Digital Limited and Agant to support institutional access to GBPA, Agant’s Pound sterling stablecoin.

entries.title: Convicted FTX founder Bankman-Fried applies for pardon
entries.summary: Sam Bankman-Fried has officially asked President Donald Trump for a pardon two years after being sentenced to 25 years in prison for stealing $8 billion from customers of FTX, the bankrupt cryptocurrency exchange he founded.

entries.title: Octus to acquire LevPro
entries.summary: Octus, the essential credit intelligence platform trusted by the world's leading financial, legal and advisory firms, today announced a definitive agreement to acquire LevPro, which upon closing will join Sky Road to create the most comprehensive and vertically integrated AI-powered portfolio management and trading solution available to CLO and private credit managers globally.

entries.title: Temenos acquires additiv to strengthen its wealth proposition
entries.summary: Temenos AG (SIX: TEMN), a global leader in banking technology, today announced that it has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire additiv AG (“additiv”), a Switzerland-based fintech company that provides a specialist platform to orchestrate financial services (the “Transaction”).

entries.title: BBVA partners AWS to build architecture for faster AI deployment
entries.summary: BBVA has enlisted Amazon Web Services to help roll out a machine learning operations (MLOps) framework that will help the Spanish bank speed up its deployment of AI models.

entries.title: eToro Assets Reclaim $20 Billion in May as Crypto Trading Keeps Sliding
entries.summary: eToro said the value of customer assets on its platform reached $20.1 billion in May, up 18% from a year earlier, as heavy stock and commodities trading offset another drop in crypto activity. The preliminary figures also showed the trading app leaning on two recent acquisitions to lift its headline account growth. The monthly snapshot extends a pattern that has run through eToro's data all year,

entries.title: TP Icap launches new credit trading and data platform
entries.summary: TP ICAP Group (“TP ICAP”), a world‑leading provider of financial markets infrastructure and data, today announced RealQ, a new credit trading and data platform designed to improve how liquidity is discovered, accessed and transacted in bond markets.

entries.title: UK Finance calls for closer UK-EU ties
entries.summary: Ten years after the Brexit referendum, UK Finance, in partnership with Freshfields, has called on the EU and the UK to put financial services on the agenda for the upcoming Leaders’ Summit, and place it within the political reset to build a more strategic financial services relationship.

entries.title: SpaceX to be first public offering on Bybit's IPO Express
entries.summary: Bybit, the world’s second-largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume, today announced the launch of Bybit IPO Express, becoming one of the first centralized crypto exchanges globally to offer tokenized IPO (initial public offerings) at the offering price.

entries.summary: Backbase announced a strategic collaboration with Mastercard to integrate Mastercard Move – Mastercard’s portfolio of global money movement capabilities – into the Backbase AI-native Banking OS.

entries.title: Visa-Mastercard fund will report claims status
entries.summary: Merchants will be able to monitor the status of claims under a quarterly reporting system for their $5.5 billion settlement with Visa and Mastercard.

entries.title: Dojo releases new suite of POS terminals
entries.summary: Dojo today unveils Dojo Go Max, its most advanced payment terminal yet, designed to help UK businesses take payments even more quickly, reliably and confidently when it matters most.
